JOHN JONES FOR DEFENDANT TOM VILLANUEVA ALSO PRESENT

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACE ON RECORD.
DEFENDANT TO VACATE 233 LAUSSAT STREET ON OR BEFORE 5PM 1/31/05 AND TO REMOVE PERSONAL PROPERTY AND TO NOT DAMAGE OR VANDALIZE PREMISES. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES, PLAINTIFF WILL PAY DEFENDANT $875. THE SECURITY DEPOSIT IS FORFEITED AND ANY RENTAL AGREEMENTS ARE FORFEITED. ALL PARTIES RELEASE ALL FUTURE CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND FEES.
JUDGMENT WILL ONLY BE FILED IF DEFENDANT BREACHES AGREEMENT.
